# First Class Fits

> Premium fashion, footwear, sportswear, accessories, and electronics — a modern, dark-themed ecommerce storefront.

First Class Fits sells curated apparel (t-shirts, hoodies, jackets, shorts, pants, socks), trainers and sneakers, sunglasses, watches, headphones, smartphones, accessories, and seasonal drops.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured products, new arrivals, best sellers, limited offers.
- [Shop](/shop): Full catalog with category and search filtering.
- [About](/about): Brand story and values.
- [Contact](/contact): Customer support and inquiries.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about ordering and products.
- [Shipping](/shipping): Shipping policies and timelines.
- [Returns](/returns): Returns and refund policy.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Customer account access.
